AI phone calling platform for outbound a: AI phone calling platform for outbound and conversational voice workflows.
To get your API key:\n1. Log in to your:
To get your API key:
1. Log in to your [Bland AI dashboard](https://app.bland.ai)
2. Go to **Profile** (bottom-left menu) -> **Settings**
3. Click **API Keys** and copy your key
Initiate an AI phone call to a recipient: Initiate an AI phone call to a recipient.
Retrieve details for a specific Bland AI: Retrieve details for a specific Bland AI call.
List recent Bland AI calls with optional: List recent Bland AI calls with optional filters.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
The number to call in E.164 format (e.g. +12223334444). Must include the country code.
Instructions for the AI agent — what it: Instructions for the AI agent — what it should say, ask, or accomplish during the call. Not required if using a Pathway ID.
UUID of a pre-built Pathway from your Bl: UUID of a pre-built Pathway from your Bland AI dashboard. When provided, it overrides the Task field. Find it in the Pathways section of your dashboard.
Exact opening line the agent will say wh: Exact opening line the agent will say when the call is answered. Leave blank to let the agent decide.
The voice the AI agent will use. Choose: The voice the AI agent will use. Choose from Bland AI preset voices optimised for phone quality.
\"Base\" is the standard model. \"Turbo\: "Base" is the standard model. "Turbo" is faster with lower latency, recommended for time-sensitive conversations.
Language code for transcription and spee: Language code for transcription and speech (e.g. "en", "es", "fr"). Defaults to "babel-en" (English with accent tolerance).
Maximum call length in minutes. The call: Maximum call length in minutes. The call ends automatically after this time. Defaults to 30.
When enabled, the AI waits for the recip: When enabled, the AI waits for the recipient to speak first before responding. Useful when calling into IVR systems.
When enabled, the call is recorded. The: When enabled, the call is recorded. The recording URL is included in the post-call data.
E.164 phone number to transfer the call: E.164 phone number to transfer the call to if the AI decides a human is needed (e.g. +12223334444).
URL that receives a POST request with fu: URL that receives a POST request with full call data (transcript, summary, recording URL) after the call ends.
Custom instructions for how the post-cal: Custom instructions for how the post-call summary should be written (max 2000 characters). Leave blank to use the default summary format.
Maximum number of calls to return.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
